name: diagram-design
description: Codex plugin for creating brand-aware technical and product diagrams as standalone HTML with inline SVG.

interface.shortDescription: Create brand-aware technical diagrams as standalone HTML/SVG
interface.longDescription: diagram-design helps create architecture, flowchart, sequence, state machine, ER/data model, timeline, swimlane, quadrant, nested, tree, layer stack, venn, and pyramid diagrams with an editorial design system and project style guide.
defaultPrompt: Create an architecture diagram for this system.
Turn this workflow into a flowchart.
Make a sequence diagram for this API flow.
